# Jan Chmielewski — Trener Personalny i Dietetyk Online

## About
Jan Chmielewski is a certified personal trainer and sports nutritionist based in Chelmza, Poland. He holds a Master's degree in Physiotherapy (Magister Fizjoterapii) and is a finalist of the Polish Championships in bodybuilding (kulturystyka). With 8+ years of experience and 200+ satisfied clients, he offers professional fitness and nutrition services online across Poland.

## Services
- Dieta Online (Online Diet Plan) — 199 PLN — Personalized 4-week nutrition plan with metabolic analysis, macro calculations, and meal recommendations
- Plan Treningowy (Training Plan) — 149 PLN — Customized 8-week training program with periodization, exercise notation, and progression tracking
- Prowadzenie Online (Online Coaching) — 399-3699 PLN/month — Comprehensive coaching combining diet + training + weekly reports + 24/7 support
- Trening Personalny (Personal Training in Chelmza) — 149 PLN/session — In-person 1-on-1 training sessions in Chelmza with physiotherapy elements

## Credentials
- Master's degree in Physiotherapy (Magister Fizjoterapii)
- Polish Bodybuilding Championships Finalist (Finalista Mistrzostw Polski w kulturystyce)
- 8+ years of professional experience
- 200+ satisfied clients across Poland
